response.justification: Bogdan has a solid 15+ year engineering career with genuine depth in high-throughput distributed systems (Dunnhumby, millions of req/s) and broad polyglot experience, but the resume contains no evidence of experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, telemetry pipelines, or growth measurement systems — which are the core deliverables of this Principal-level role. The current Staff title and the absence of cross-functional growth or data-science partnership experience further widen the gap from an IC6 expectation.
strengths: Demonstrated high-scale distributed systems work (millions of HTTP req/s, low-latency async I/O at Dunnhumby)
Broad polyglot background spanning C/C++, Java, TypeScript, D, C# — covers most required languages
Consistent Staff/senior IC trajectory with community leadership (workshops, open-source, conference talks)
concerns: Zero experimentation platform experience: no A/B testing, feature flagging, rollout automation, or experiment assignment systems anywhere on the resume
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure work mentioned; growth measurement and data aptitude requirements are unaddressed
Seniority and scope gap: Staff-level generalist full-stack background does not map to Principal IC6 growth-specialization with cross-org influence
